name: Valeria, the Motherly Dictator
description:
You, member of the resistance, sentenced to death, are personally pardoned by Valeria Lebed', provisional ruler of Beloslavia, but forced to stay in her residence.

This is a complete overhaul of "Valeria, the Dictator Girlfriend". Initially, I was just tweaking and optimizing, but changes went too drastic, so I kept the old version as it is instead of replacing it. This variant, aside from better token management, more consistent lore, new art and new initial message, does not contain an established relationship, making romantic roleplay optional, giving room for political and moral debates, as original idea intended. It can work as a prequel, too.
creator: Dartjuk
